children.heading: Maintenance of effort
children.label: a Maintenance of effort
children.text: A local educational agency may receive funds under this part for any fiscal year only if the State educational agency involved finds that the local educational agency has maintained the agency’s fiscal effort in accordance with .section 7901 of this title

children.heading: Federal funds to supplement, not supplant, non-Federal funds
children.label: b Federal funds to supplement, not supplant, non-Federal funds

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A State educational agency or local educational agency shall use Federal funds received under this part only to supplement the funds that would, in the absence of such Federal funds, be made available from State and local sources for the education of students participating in programs assisted under this part, and not to supplant such funds.

children.heading: Compliance
children.label: 2 Compliance
children.text: To demonstrate compliance with paragraph (1), a local educational agency shall demonstrate that the methodology used to allocate State and local funds to each school receiving assistance under this part ensures that such school receives all of the State and local funds it would otherwise receive if it were not receiving assistance under this part.

children.label: A
children.text: identify that an individual cost or service supported under this part is supplemental; or

children.label: B
children.text: provide services under this part through a particular instructional method or in a particular instructional setting in order to demonstrate such agency’s compliance with paragraph (1).

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: 4 Prohibition
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to authorize or permit the Secretary to prescribe the specific methodology a local educational agency uses to allocate State and local funds to each school receiving assistance under this part.

children.label: A
children.text: shall meet the compliance requirement under paragraph (2) not later than 2 years after ; andDecember 10, 2015

children.label: B
children.text: may demonstrate compliance with the requirement under paragraph (1) before the end of such 2-year period using the method such local educational agency used on the day before .December 10, 2015

children.heading: Comparable services
children.label: A Comparable services
children.text: Except as provided in paragraphs (4) and (5), a local educational agency may receive funds under this part only if State and local funds will be used in schools served under this part to provide services that, taken as a whole, are at least comparable to services in schools that are not receiving funds under this part.

children.heading: Substantially comparable services
children.label: B Substantially comparable services
children.text: If the local educational agency is serving all of such agency’s schools under this part, such agency may receive funds under this part only if such agency will use State and local funds to provide services that, taken as a whole, are substantially comparable in each school.

children.heading: Basis
children.label: C Basis
children.text: A local educational agency may meet the requirements of subparagraphs (A) and (B) on a grade-span by grade-span basis or a school-by-school basis.

children.label: i
children.text: a local educational agency-wide salary schedule;

children.label: ii
children.text: a policy to ensure equivalence among schools in teachers, administrators, and other staff; and

children.label: iii
children.text: a policy to ensure equivalence among schools in the provision of curriculum materials and instructional supplies.

children.heading: Determinations
children.label: B Determinations
children.text: For the purpose of this subsection, in the determination of expenditures per pupil from State and local funds, or instructional salaries per pupil from State and local funds, staff salary differentials for years of employment shall not be included in such determinations.

children.heading: Exclusions
children.label: C Exclusions
children.text: A local educational agency need not include unpredictable changes in student enrollment or personnel assignments that occur after the beginning of a school year in determining comparability of services under this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: develop procedures for compliance with this subsection; and

children.label: B
children.text: maintain records that are updated biennially documenting such agency’s compliance with this subsection.

children.heading: Inapplicability
children.label: 4 Inapplicability
children.text: This subsection shall not apply to a local educational agency that does not have more than one building for each grade span.

children.label: A
children.text: language instruction educational programs; and

children.label: B
children.text: the excess costs of providing services to children with disabilities as determined by the local educational agency.

children.heading: Exclusion of funds
children.label: d Exclusion of funds
children.text: For the purpose of complying with subsections (b) and (c), a State educational agency or local educational agency may exclude supplemental State or local funds expended in any school attendance area or school for programs that meet the intent and purposes of this part.
